# Top-level build/test tasks.
#
# `make test` rebuilds every fixture from clean installs and runs its test
# suite.
# 
PYTHON ?= python3.12

.PHONY: test test-bigapp clean

test: test-bigapp ## Build + test the fixture from clean

test-bigapp: ## Large Maven fixture (vendored Grouper 4.x, 13-module reactor): compile + build, no test run
	# The reactor's tests need external infrastructure, so this compiles and
	# builds the modules without running them. -DskipTests (NOT
	# -Dmaven.test.skip): the `grouper` module depends on grouperClient's
	# test-jar, which -Dmaven.test.skip would not build.
	cd fixtures/bigapp/grouper-parent && mvn -B -DskipTests install

clean: ## Remove build artifacts and virtualenvs
	find fixtures/bigapp -type d -name target -prune -exec rm -rf {} +

item.text: There’s no local OSV/Grype binary, but Trivy is installed and Maven is available. I’m going to use Trivy as the dependency vulnerability scanner, then cross-check any awkward cases against Maven resolution so we don’t only fix declared versions while leaving vulnerable transitive jars in the reactor.

The first scan found many repeated findings across module POMs, with `grouper-parent` carrying most managed versions. The table output is too noisy to trust manually, so I’m switching to JSON and deduplicating by package/version/fixed-version/actionable status.

item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from collections import defaultdict
j=json.load(open('/tmp/bigapp-trivy.json'))
g=defaultdict(list)
for r in j.get('Results',[]):
    for v in r.get('Vulnerabilities') or []:
        g[(v.get('PkgName'),v.get('InstalledVersion'))].append(v)
for (pkg,inst), vs in sorted(g.items()):
    fixed=sorted(set(v.get('FixedVersion') or '' for v in vs))
    statuses=sorted(set(v.get('Status') or '' for v in vs))
    sevs=sorted(set(v.get('Severity') or '' for v in vs))
    ids=sorted(set(v.get('VulnerabilityID') for v in vs))
    print('\\t'.join([pkg, inst or '', ', '.join(fixed), ','.join(statuses), ','.join(sevs), str(len(ids)), ','.join(ids)]))
PY"

item.text: The deduplicated scan shows two classes: packages with fixed releases we can usually force through parent dependency management, and older abandoned coordinates where the scanner reports no fixed version. I’m locating each package in the POMs now to separate direct version bumps from transitive overrides and true no-fixed-version cases.

item.command: /bin/bash -lc "for p in 'not-yet-commons-ssl' 'jackson-core' 'jackson-databind' 'guava' 'google-oauth-client' 'protobuf-java' 'nimbus-jose-jwt' 'commons-collections' 'commons-httpclient' 'commons-lang' 'dom4j' 'vt-ldap' 'netty' 'json-lib' 'activemq' 'commons-compress' 'commons-lang3' 'apache-mime4j' 'neethi' 'xmlsec' 'velocity' 'jose4j' 'bcpkix' 'bcprov' 'hibernate-core' 'opensaml' 'esapi' 'pac4j-core' 'spring-' 'ion-java' 'xalan'; do printf '\\n## %s\\n' \""'$p"; rg -n "$p" fixtures/bigapp --glob '"'pom.xml'; done"

/bin/bash -lc "for p in 'not-yet-commons-ssl' 'jackson-core' 'jackson-databind' 'guava' 'google-oauth-client' 'protobuf-java' 'nimbus-jose-jwt' 'commons-collections' 'commons-httpclient' 'commons-lang' 'dom4j' 'vt-ldap' 'netty' 'json-lib' 'activemq' 'commons-compress' 'commons-lang3' 'apache-mime4j' 'neethi' 'xmlsec' 'velocity' 'jose4j' 'bcpkix' 'bcprov' 'hibernate-core' 'opensaml' 'esapi' 'pac4j-core' 'spring-' 'ion-java' 'xalan'; do printf '\\n## %s\\n' \""'$p"; rg -n "$p" fixtures/bigapp --glob '"'pom.xml'; done"

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
  xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
  <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

  <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
  <artifactId>grouper-activemq</artifactId>
  <name>Grouper AMQ</name>
  <description>The Grouper AMQ Integration</description>
  <packaging>jar</packaging>
  
  <parent>
        <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
        <artifactId>grouper-parent</artifactId>
        <version>4.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
        <relativePath>../../grouper-parent</relativePath>
  </parent>
 
  <dependencies>
    <dependency>
        <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
        <artifactId>grouper</artifactId>
        <version>${project.version}</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
        <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
        <artifactId>grouperClient</artifactId>
        <version>${project.version}</version>
        <exclusions>
            <exclusion>
                <groupId>xalan</groupId>
                <artifactId>xalan</artifactId>
            </exclusion>
        </exclusions>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
        <groupId>org.apache.activemq</groupId>
        <artifactId>activemq-broker</artifactId>
        <version>5.19.2</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
        <groupId>org.apache.activemq</groupId>
        <artifactId>activemq-jaas</artifactId>
        <version>5.19.2</version>
    </dependency>
  </dependencies>
    
  <build>
	<sourceDirectory>source</sourceDirectory>
	<testSourceDirectory>test</testSourceDirectory>
	<resources>
    <resource>
      <directory>conf</directory>
      <includes>
        <include>**/*</include>
      </includes>
    </resource>
    <resource>
      <directory>misc</directory>
      <includes>
          <include>**/*</include>
      </includes>
    </resource>
	</resources>
	<plugins>
        <plugin>
            <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
            <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
            <configuration>
                <archive>
                    <index>true</index>
                    <manifestEntries>
                        <Specification-Title>${project.name}</Specification-Title>
                        <Implementation-Vendor>${project.organization.name}</Implementation-Vendor>
                        <Implementation-Title>${project.artifactId}</Implementation-Title>
                        <Implementation-Version>${project.version}</Implementation-Version>
                        <Build-Timestamp>${maven.build.timestamp}</Build-Timestamp>
                    </manifestEntries>
                </archive>
            </configuration>
        </plugin>
	</plugins>
  </build>
</project>

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
  xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/maven-v4_0_0.xsd">
  <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
  <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.ldappc</groupId>
  <artifactId>apacheds-ldappc-schema</artifactId>
  <packaging>jar</packaging>
  <version>1.0.3</version>
  <name>Schema Project</name>
  <url>http://directory.apache.org/</url>

  <!--
    This assumes that this project and ldappc are checked out
    from version control under the same directory.
  -->
  <distributionManagement>
    <repository>
      <id>i2mi</id>
      <name>Internet2 Middleware Initiative Repository</name>
      <url>file://${basedir}/../ldappc/i2mi-repository</url>
    </repository>
  </distributionManagement>

  <dependencies>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.directory.server</groupId>
      <artifactId>apacheds-core</artifactId>
      <version>1.0.2</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.directory.server</groupId>
      <artifactId>apacheds-server-unit</artifactId>
      <version>1.0.2</version>
      <scope>test</scope>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>junit</groupId>
      <artifactId>junit</artifactId>
      <version>3.8.1</version>
      <scope>test</scope>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
      <artifactId>nlog4j</artifactId>
      <version>1.2.25</version>
      <scope>test</scope>
    </dependency>
  </dependencies>

  <build>
    <!-- Uncomment to override default jar naming convention
    <finalName>car-schema.jar</finalName>
    -->

    <plugins>
      <plugin>
        <groupId>org.apache.directory.server</groupId>
        <artifactId>apacheds-core-plugin</artifactId>
		<version>1.0.2</version>
        <configuration>
          <schemaSourcesDir>src/main/schema</schemaSourcesDir>
          <schemas>
            <schema>
              <name>eduMember</name>
              <pkg>edu.internet2.middleware.ldappc.apachedsSchema</pkg>
              <dependencies>
                <dependency>system</dependency>
                <dependency>core</dependency>
              </dependencies>
            </schema>
            <schema>
              <name>eduPermission</name>
              <pkg>edu.internet2.middleware.ldappc.apachedsSchema</pkg>
              <dependencies>
                <dependency>system</dependency>
                <dependency>core</dependency>
              </dependencies>
            </schema>
            <schema>
              <name>eduPerson</name>
              <pkg>edu.internet2.middleware.ldappc.apachedsSchema</pkg>
              <dependencies>
                <dependency>system</dependency>
                <dependency>core</dependency>
              </dependencies>
            </schema>
            <schema>
              <name>kitnEduPerson</name>
              <pkg>edu.internet2.middleware.ldappc.apachedsSchema</pkg>
              <dependencies>
                <dependency>system</dependency>
                <dependency>core</dependency>
              </dependencies>
            </schema>
          </schemas>
        </configuration>
        <executions>
          <execution>
            <goals>
              <goal>generate</goal>
            </goals>
          </execution>
        </executions>
      </plugin>
    </plugins>
  </build>
</project>

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
    xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/maven-v4_0_0.xsd">

    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <parent>
        <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
        <artifactId>grouper-parent</artifactId>
        <version>4.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
        <relativePath>../../grouper-parent</relativePath>
    </parent>

    <name>Grouper Box</name>
    <description>Box Integration Library</description>
    <artifactId>grouper-box</artifactId>
    <packaging>jar</packaging>

    <dependencies>
    
        <dependency>
            <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouper</artifactId>
            <version>${project.version}</version>
            <scope>provided</scope>
        </dependency>
        <!-- https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/org.bitbucket.b_c/jose4j -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.bitbucket.b_c</groupId>
            <artifactId>jose4j</artifactId>
            <version>0.9.3</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.box</groupId>
            <artifactId>box-java-sdk</artifactId>
            <version>2.17.0</version>
            <exclusions>
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>org.bitbucket.b_c</groupId>
                    <artifactId>jose4j</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
            </exclusions>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>commons-logging</groupId>
            <artifactId>commons-logging</artifactId>
            <version>${commons.logging.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouper</artifactId>
            <version>${project.version}</version>
            <type>test-jar</type>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <archive>
                        <index>true</index>
                        <manifestEntries>
                            <Specification-Title>${project.name}</Specification-Title>
                            <Implementation-Vendor>${project.organization.name}</Implementation-Vendor>
                            <Implementation-Title>${project.artifactId}</Implementation-Title>
                            <Implementation-Version>${project.version}</Implementation-Version>
                            <Implementation-URL>${project.url}</Implementation-URL>
                            <Main-Class>edu.internet2.middleware.grouperBox.GrouperBoxSync</Main-Class>
                            <Build-Timestamp>${maven.build.timestamp}</Build-Timestamp>
                        </manifestEntries>
                    </archive>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

</project>

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"

    <dependencies>

            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId>
            <artifactId>commons-lang3</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.pac4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>pac4j-core</artifactId>
            <version>${pac4j.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.pac4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>pac4j-cas-clientv4</artifactId>
            <version>${pac4j.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.pac4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>javaee-pac4j</artifactId>
            <version>${javaee-pac4j.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.pac4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>pac4j-saml-opensamlv5</artifactId>
            <version>${pac4j.version}</version>
            <exclusions>
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>

item.text: A few vulnerable packages are coming from transitive dependencies in modules outside the root reactor as well, such as the standalone `apacheds-ldappc-schema` and optional plugin POMs. I’m treating those as in scope because they are under `fixtures/bigapp` and Trivy reports them directly.

item.text: I’m about to edit dependency versions only: central managed versions in `grouper-parent`, direct versions in the standalone/optional module POMs, and dependency-management overrides for vulnerable transitives that the scanner resolves through Maven. I’ll also add `FIXES.md` with one package entry each, including no-fixed-version cases.

item.aggregated_output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!--

    Copyright 2014 Internet2

    Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
    you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
    You may obtain a copy of the License at

      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

    Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    limitations under the License.

-->
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
    xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/maven-v4_0_0.xsd">

    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <parent>
        <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware.grouper</groupId>
        <artifactId>grouper-parent</artifactId>
        <version>4.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
        <!-- not sure if this should be ../../grouper-parent or ../grouper-parent -->
        <relativePath>../../grouper-parent</relativePath>
    </parent>

    <name>Grouper Plugin for Shibboleth</name>
    <description>
        Provides DataConnector and AttributeDefinition extensions for the Shibboleth AttributeResolver
    </description>
    <artifactId>grouper-shib</artifactId>
    <packaging>jar</packaging>

    <repositories>
        <repository>
            <id>build.shibboleth.net</id>
            <name>Shibboleth</name>
            <layout>default</layout>
            <url>http://build.shibboleth.net/nexus/content/repositories/releases</url>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </repository>
        <repository>
            <id>shibboleth</id>
            <url>https://build.shibboleth.net/nexus/content/groups/public</url>
        </repository>
    </repositories>

    <properties>
        <!-- location of grouper api distribution -->
        <grouper.dir>../grouper</grouper.dir>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- Compile dependencies -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>slf4j-api</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
            <artifactId>slf4j-log4j12</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouper</artifactId>
            <version>${project.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware</groupId>
            <artifactId>shibboleth-common</artifactId>
            <exclusions>
                <!-- Exclude logback in lieu of sl4j-log4j12 binding. -->
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>ch.qos.logback</groupId>
                    <artifactId>logback-classic</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
                <exclusion>
                    <groupId>org.slf4j</groupId>
                    <artifactId>log4j-over-slf4j</artifactId>
                </exclusion>
            </exclusions>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Test dependencies -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>${project.groupId}</groupId>
            <artifactId>grouper</artifactId>
            <version>${project.version}</version>
            <type>test-jar</type>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <!-- todo needed for tests but 1.3.3 test jar not published -->
        <!--
        <dependency>
            <groupId>edu.internet2.middleware</groupId>
            <artifactId>shibboleth-common</artifactId>
            <type>test-jar</type>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        -->

    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <argLine>-Xmx512m</argLine>
                    <additionalClasspathElements>
                        <additionalClasspathElement>${grouper.dir}/confForTest</additionalClasspathElement>
                        <additionalClasspathElement>${grouper.dir}/conf</additionalClasspathElement>
                    </additionalClasspathElements>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-assembly-plugin</artifactId>                
                <configuration>
                    <descriptors>
                        <descriptor>src/main/assembly/bin.xml</descriptor>
                        <descriptor>src/main/assembly/src.xml</descriptor>
                    </descriptors>
                </configuration>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>make-assembly</id>
                        <phase>package</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>attached</goal>
                        </goals>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

</project>

<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"

item.text: Some fixed-version suggestions from the scanner are cross-major and may not exist for old coordinates, especially Bouncy Castle’s `jdk15on` artifacts. I’m verifying candidate versions with Maven before choosing edits, because a “fixed” version that Maven cannot resolve would just break the build.

item.text: Bouncy Castle `bcprov-jdk15on`/`bcpkix-jdk15on` has no Maven-resolvable fixed release for the same old coordinates beyond `1.70`; the scanner’s newer fixed lines refer to replacement coordinate families. I’ll bump older instances to `1.70` where possible and document the residual no-fixed-version status for the `jdk15on` coordinates.

item.text: The first broad patch missed exact XML context, so I’m switching to smaller patches around stable anchors. That keeps the XML readable and avoids accidental structural edits.

The parent POM now carries managed overrides for the common vulnerable transitives and core library bumps. I’m adding the remaining web-service, SAML, Spring, and Netty overrides before touching module-local direct versions.

Next I’m updating module-local direct versions: ActiveMQ, Axis2, installer compression, jose4j, pac4j, test plugin commons-lang3, and the standalone ApacheDS schema POM. These are targeted version changes rather than refactors.

The generated WS client now inherits the upgraded Axis2 and Bouncy Castle versions from the parent. I’m doing the same for the main WS module and then I’ll validate the POMs before running the full build.

For the standalone ApacheDS schema POM, `commons-collections` can be overridden to the fixed `3.2.2`; its old `commons-lang` transitive has no fixed version on the `commons-lang:commons-lang` coordinate, so that will be documented rather than hidden.

item.text: The edited parent POM validates as XML/Maven. I’m rescanning with Trivy now to see which findings are actually gone and which residual ones are no-fixed-version abandoned coordinates.
The scan is still running; the Maven fixture has many POMs, so this pass takes about a minute. I’ll use the JSON result to adjust any missed direct versions rather than guessing from the old report.

item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from collections import defaultdict
j=json.load(open('/tmp/bigapp-trivy-after.json'))
g=defaultdict(list)
for r in j.get('Results',[]):
    for v in r.get('Vulnerabilities') or []:
        g[(v.get('PkgName'),v.get('InstalledVersion'))].append(v)
for (pkg,inst), vs in sorted(g.items()):
    fixed=sorted(set(v.get('FixedVersion') or '' for v in vs))
    statuses=sorted(set(v.get('Status') or '' for v in vs))
    sevs=sorted(set(v.get('Severity') or '' for v in vs))
    ids=sorted(set(v.get('VulnerabilityID') for v in vs))
    print('\\t'.join([pkg, inst or '', ', '.join(fixed), ','.join(statuses), ','.join(sevs), str(len(ids)), ','.join(ids)]))
PY"

item.text: The rescan reduced several findings but exposed that Trivy’s POM scanner is still resolving inherited/transitive versions statically in some modules despite dependency management. I’m mapping the remaining targets and will add explicit direct/version overrides where Maven supports a fixed release; abandoned or non-resolvable coordinates will stay documented as no fixed version.

item.text: The remaining fixed-version findings are mostly scanner-visible transitive versions in standalone test plugin POMs and a newer Spring advisory. I’m adding explicit fixed overrides for those, and updating Spring to a release that clears the newer 2025 advisory.

I’m adding explicit fixed dependencies to the two standalone test plugin POMs because they do not inherit `grouper-parent` dependency management, so parent-only fixes do not affect their scanner results.

The direct scanner overrides are in place. I’m running the required root build now; if the larger dependency bumps expose an API incompatibility, I’ll adjust to the smallest fixed version that still builds.

`make test` is still running. The checkstyle parser errors shown are pre-existing source/parser issues with `failOnViolation=false`, so Maven continued past them; I’m waiting for the actual reactor result.

item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from collections import defaultdict
j=json.load(open('/tmp/bigapp-trivy-final.json'))
g=defaultdict(list)
for r in j.get('Results',[]):
    for v in r.get('Vulnerabilities') or []:
        g[(v.get('PkgName'),v.get('InstalledVersion'))].append(v)
for (pkg,inst), vs in sorted(g.items()):
    fixed=sorted(set(v.get('FixedVersion') or '' for v in vs))
    statuses=sorted(set(v.get('Status') or '' for v in vs))
    sevs=sorted(set(v.get('Severity') or '' for v in vs))
    ids=sorted(set(v.get('VulnerabilityID') for v in vs))
    print('\\t'.join([pkg, inst or '', ', '.join(fixed), ','.join(statuses), ','.join(sevs), str(len(ids)), ','.join(ids)]))
PY"

/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from collections import defaultdict
j=json.load(open('/tmp/bigapp-trivy-final.json'))
g=defaultdict(set)
for r in j.get('Results',[]):
    for v in r.get('Vulnerabilities') or []:
        g[(v.get('PkgName'), v.get('InstalledVersion'), v.get('FixedVersion') or '', v.get('Status') or '')].add(v.get('VulnerabilityID'))
print(len(g), 'remaining package/version groups')
for (pkg, ver, fixed, status), ids in sorted(g.items()):
    print(f\"{pkg}@{ver} status={status} fixed={fixed or '<none>'} ids={','.join(sorted(ids))}\")
PY"

item.text:
Implemented dependency remediation under `fixtures/bigapp` and added [FIXES.md](/tmp/bomly-study-edixaibx/codex-bare-bigapp-2-1783750777/repo/FIXES.md).

Changed Maven dependency versions/overrides for the vulnerable packages that have usable fixed versions, including Jackson, Guava, Google OAuth Client, protobuf, Nimbus JOSE JWT, ActiveMQ, Axis2, commons-compress, Netty, Spring, ESAPI, OpenSAML, xmlsec, xalan, jose4j, AWS SDK/Ion, and related transitives.

For packages where no same-coordinate fixed Maven version exists, I documented that explicitly in `FIXES.md`: `not-yet-commons-ssl`, `commons-httpclient`, legacy `commons-lang`, legacy `dom4j`, `json-lib`, `velocity`, old Bouncy Castle `jdk15on` artifacts, and `hibernate-core` where Trivy reports no fixed version.

Verification:
- `make test` passed.
- Final Trivy scan leaves only the documented no-fixed-version/non-resolvable same-coordinate cases.
- `git diff --check` passed.
